headline: UPS Gears Up to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: UPS heads into Q2 earnings with lower volumes, rising per-piece revenues and cost cuts shaping profitability as investors await updated guidance.

headline: 3 Unpopular Stocks We’re Skeptical Of

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on United Parcel Service, Raises Price Target to $117
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Jonathan Chappell   maintains United Parcel Service (NYSE:UPS) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $111 to $117.

headline: Bernstein Maintains Outperform on United Parcel Service, Raises Price Target to $133
summary: Bernstein  analyst David Vernon   maintains United Parcel Service (NYSE:UPS) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $130 to $133.
